'''''Darth Maul'' 3''' is the third issue in the [[Star Wars: Darth Maul (2000)|''Star Wars: Darth Maul'']] series of comics. It was published on [[November 1]], [[2000]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Publisher's summary==
''The ultimate enforcer, Darth Maul, continues his single-handed decimation of the ranks of the galactic crime syndicate Black Sun. As lieutenant after lieutenant falls under the swift blade of Maul's cold wrath, Black Sun pulls itself together to discuss how to deal with this new threat. Aware of Black Sun's plan, Maul shows up at Black Sun headquarters just as the in-fighting starts, and all hell breaks loose—Maul-style! Be sure not to miss this action-filled third chapter in the long-awaited ''Darth Maul'' series, written by comics superstar Ron Marz (''Green Lantern'', ''Batman/Tarzan'') and with dazzling art by Jan Duursema and Rick Magyar, fresh off their stint on ''Star Wars: Republic: Twilight''!''

==Plot summary==
On [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], Darth Maul kills [[Morn]], another [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] of Black Sun. In [[Alexi Garyn]]'s [[Black Sun fortress|fortress]] on [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]], [[Asa Naga]] tells the gathered Vigos about Maul's attack on [[Darnada]], but Garyn assures the Vigos that Maul cannot defeat the gathered strength of their bodyguards. Maul prepares to attack the fortress and reports to [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] via [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]]. Maul begins his assault by attacking the Black Sun sentries. Garyn's [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] bodyguard [[Mighella]] tells him that she senses a disturbance in the Force. Maul fights through the Black Sun guards and reaches the antechamber to Garyn's throne room.
